hero.name: Rahul
hero.bio: I transform complex datasets into actionable insights and build robust, scalable applications. Specializing in Python, Machine Learning, and Cloud Architecture, I bridge the gap between raw data and strategic decision-making.

about.p1: I am a passionate Data Science Analyst and Software Engineer with a knack for turning raw data into strategic assets. My expertise lies in building predictive models, optimizing data pipelines, and developing scalable software solutions.
about.p2: From automating 100K+ record queries to improving decision-making efficiency by 15%, I focus on tangible impact. I leverage Python, Machine Learning, and Cloud Technologies to solve complex business challenges.

bullets: Interpreted datasets to extract insights that led to a 15% improvement in data-driven decision-making.
Standardized data cleaning procedures using Python and Pandas, achieving 99.9% accuracy.
Queried and examined over 100K records weekly using SQL and Python, cutting retrieval time by 20%.
Audited data quality, identifying and resolving 95% of data discrepancies.
Directed a team of three in developing responsive websites, increasing user engagement by 20%.
Instituted automated code validation and CI pipelines, cutting bugs by 25%.
Boosted system efficiency by cutting load times by 25% using C++ and Python.
Engineered blockchain application solutions with Python and Solidity, improving code efficiency by 30%.
Orchestrated Docker deployments on AWS, improving transaction speed by 15%.

projects.title: Sales Analysis Dashboard
projects.desc: An interactive Power BI dashboard analyzing 12 months of sales data. Segmented product data into 15+ subcategories and mapped regional profits across 50 zones, identifying optimization opportunities that boosted profitability.

projects.title: Financial Market Trend Predictor
projects.desc: A Python-based analytics engine that evaluated stock and cryptocurrency trends, achieving a 15% increase in predictive accuracy through machine learning models.

education.institution: Acropolis Institute of Technology and Research
